offensive_abilities.name: Ice Traverser
offensive_abilities.text: Ice and snow are not difficult terrain to a sleigh, but all other terrains are difficult terrain for it.

offensive_abilities.name: Sluggish
offensive_abilities.text: This vehicle must move twice its length for each 90-degree turn it makes.

modifiers.name: pulled by 2 Large creatures or 6 Medium creatures

movement.name: the Speed of the slowest pulling creature

piloting_check.text: Driving Lore (DC 15) or Nature (DC 17 to DC 25, depending on pulling creature)

statistics.space: 10 feet long, 5 feet wide, 4 feet high
